Skip to content
bgms 0.2.0.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
  • Changelog

Extract Coefficients from a bgms Object

Source: R/bgms-methods.R
coef.bgms.Rd

Returns the posterior mean main effects, pairwise effects, and edge inclusion indicators from a bgms model fit.

Usage

# S3 method for class 'bgms'
coef(object, ...)

Arguments

object

An object of class bgms.

...

Ignored.

Value

A list with the following components:

main

Posterior mean of the main-effect parameters. NULL for GGM models (no main effects). For OMRF models this is a numeric matrix (p x max_categories) of category thresholds. For mixed MRF models this is a list with $discrete (p x max_categories matrix) and $continuous (q x 1 matrix of means).

pairwise

Posterior mean of the partial association matrix (zero diagonal). Use extract_precision() for the full precision matrix.

indicator

Posterior mean of the edge inclusion indicators (if available).

See also

bgm(), print.bgms(), summary.bgms()

Other posterior-methods: coef.bgmCompare(), print.bgmCompare(), print.bgms(), summary.bgmCompare(), summary.bgms()

Examples

# \donttest{
fit = bgm(x = Wenchuan[, 1:3])
#> 2 rows with missing values excluded (n = 360 remaining).
#> To impute missing values instead, use na_action = "impute".
#> Chain 1 (Warmup): ⦗╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 50/4000 (1.2%)
#> Chain 2 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 62/4000 (1.6%)
#> Chain 3 (Warmup): ⦗╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 49/4000 (1.2%)
#> Chain 4 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 59/4000 (1.5%)
#> Total   (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 220/16000 (1.4%)

#> Chain 1 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 100/4000 (2.5%)

#> Elapsed: 14s | ETA: 0s
coef(fit)
#> $main
#>               cat (1)   cat (2)   cat (3)    cat (4)
#> intrusion  0.80797333 -1.173627 -3.526287  -7.426376
#> dreams    -0.40024149 -3.285680 -6.341916 -10.424085
#> flash      0.07136852 -2.131199 -4.585624  -8.425324
#> 
#> $pairwise
#>           intrusion    dreams     flash
#> intrusion 0.0000000 0.3486414 0.2136940
#> dreams    0.3486414 0.0000000 0.2803905
#> flash     0.2136940 0.2803905 0.0000000
#> 
#> $indicator
#>           intrusion dreams flash
#> intrusion         0      1     1
#> dreams            1      0     1
#> flash             1      1     0
#> 
# }
